metadata.closeAvailabilityConvention: UTC daily close is available after that date closes; structural fit includes the origin close; calibration targets must be strictly earlier than origin.
metadata.deterministicRerunContract: same data/config/seed produces the same content hash; generatedAt and artifact filename excluded

methodology.structuralFit: expanding point-in-time power-law fit through origin close
methodology.intervalCalibration: prior reconstructed-policy errors with targetDate < originDate
methodology.benchmarkSchedule: identical origin/horizon rows for all available models
methodology.nestedSelection: six inner walk-forward folds wholly before each outer origin; candidates selected on inner target MALE only

frozenSpecification.fitWindows: expanding through inner origin; YL-1 anchor ends at least one horizon earlier
frozenSpecification.initialization: YL-1 default weight 0.5 and YL-2 grid index 1 only when no valid inner folds
frozenSpecification.missingData: state-space prediction-only update; invalid structural fits score Infinity
frozenSpecification.failureBehavior: report skip/reject; never silently enable candidate

candidateEvaluation.verdict: path-diagnostics-only; q50 unchanged; terminal calibration not promotion-ready

pathDiagnostics.twoSampleTolerance: per-origin absolute diagnostic deltas with moving bootstrap; tails, drawdown, dependence and realized volatility included
pathDiagnostics.terminalCalibration: horizon-scaled simulated q10/q50/q90 with pinball/NLL/coverage/width in horizon checks

candidateEvaluation.previouslyInspectedPeriods: 2017-2021, 2022-2024, and 2025+ are robustness diagnostics, not clean confirmation
